response.justification: Bogdan brings 20 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains, exceeding the 15-year requirement, and currently works with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq. However, the role emphasizes strategic advisory to customers and partners on AI adoption and director-level influence, areas where his background is primarily hands-on engineering. He also lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field and has limited evidence of recognized expertise in shipping AI products or advising at the strategic/C-level.
strengths: 20 years of proven software engineering spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure—exceeds experience requirements
Currently working with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, directly relevant to AI strategy focus
Founder of GISCollective and demonstrated mentorship through workshops and teaching, showing leadership and ability to inspire others
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI—a stated preferred qualification for this specialized role
Background is primarily hands-on engineering; limited evidence of strategic customer advisory or C-level partnership engagement around AI adoption
No demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products or platforms, or advising on cutting-edge AI adoption strategies

key_factors.factor: Current AI infrastructure and agent framework experience
Lack of strategic advisory and customer-facing AI expertise
